name: Lnk.Bio
description: Lnk.Bio link-in-bio platform. Create, list, and delete bio links, manage link groups, and retrieve profile information.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Retrieve basic profile information for the authenticated Lnk.Bio account.

tools.name: list_links
tools.description: Retrieve all links in your Lnk.Bio account, in the same order they appear on your public page. Useful for getting link IDs for updates or deletions.

tools.name: create_link
tools.description: Create a new link on your Lnk.Bio profile. The link is immediately published and appears on top of your existing links.

link.description: Target URL for the link (e.g. https://example.com).

image.description: Image URL to display alongside the link. Optional.

group_id.description: Numeric ID of the group to add the link to. Optional. Get group IDs from the List Groups tool.

schedule_from.description: Start time for scheduled visibility in RFC3339 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+HH:MM). Optional.

schedule_to.description: End time for scheduled visibility in RFC3339 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+HH:MM). Optional.

tools.name: delete_link
tools.description: Delete an existing link from your Lnk.Bio profile. Use the List Links tool to find the link ID first.

id.description: The unique ID of the link to delete. Get this from the List Links tool.

tools.name: list_groups
tools.description: Retrieve all link groups in your Lnk.Bio account. Groups help organize links into categories on your public page.
